title: Vishamangalesvarar Temple, Thudaiyur
tagline: Vishamangalesvarar Temple, Thudaiyur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Saptharishishwarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Thudaiyur in Tiruchirapalli district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Saptharishishwarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Thudaiyur in Tiruchirapalli district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvasi Mattruraivaradeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tiruvasi Mattruraivaradeswarar Temple is a Tamil temple located at Tiruvasi in Trichy district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tirupalasiramam.

topPlaces.name: Melur, Tiruchirappalli
topPlaces.description: Melur near Srirangam, is a neighbourhood of the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India. There is a butterfly park in Melur under the forest department.

topPlaces.name: Mutharasanallur
topPlaces.description: Muttharasanallur is a neighborhood of Tiruchirapalli in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located approximately 7 km to the west of Trichy City on the road to the town of Karur.

topPlaces.name: Srirangam division
topPlaces.description: Srirangam division is a new revenue division, with Srirangam as its headquarters, became functional in Tiruchirappalli district with Chief Minister Jayalalithaa. This will be the fourth revenue division in the district after Tiruchi, Lalgudi, and Musiri.

topPlaces.name: Srirangam
topPlaces.description: Srirangam is a neighbourhood in the city of Tiruchirappalli in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. A river island, Srirangam is bounded by the Kaveri River on one side and its distributary Kollidam on the other side.

topPlaces.name: Raghavendrapuram
topPlaces.description: Raghavendrapuram is the name of a place in India. There are at least two villages with the same name, one in Tamil Nadu and the other in Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Srirangam Island
topPlaces.description: Srirangam Island is a river island in the city of Tiruchirappalli, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The island is formed by the Kaveri and Kollidam Rivers.

topPlaces.name: Kadiyakurichy
topPlaces.description: Kadiyakurichy is a village in the Srirangam taluk of Tiruchirappalli district in Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Tiruvasi Mattruraivaradeswarar Temple is a Tamil temple located at Tiruvasi in Trichy district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tirupalasiramam.
Melur near Srirangam, is a neighbourhood of the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India. There is a butterfly park in Melur under the forest department.
Muttharasanallur is a neighborhood of Tiruchirapalli in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located approximately 7 km to the west of Trichy City on the road to the town of Karur.

Srirangam division is a new revenue division, with Srirangam as its headquarters, became functional in Tiruchirappalli district with Chief Minister Jayalalithaa. This will be the fourth revenue division in the district after Tiruchi, Lalgudi, and Musiri.

Srirangam is a neighbourhood in the city of Tiruchirappalli in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. A river island, Srirangam is bounded by the Kaveri River on one side and its distributary Kollidam on the other side.
Raghavendrapuram is the name of a place in India. There are at least two villages with the same name, one in Tamil Nadu and the other in Andhra Pradesh.
Srirangam Island is a river island in the city of Tiruchirappalli, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The island is formed by the Kaveri and Kollidam Rivers.
Kadiyakurichy is a village in the Srirangam taluk of Tiruchirappalli district in Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vishamangalesvarar Temple, Thudaiyur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vishamangalesvarar Temple, Thudaiyur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vishamangalesvarar Temple, Thudaiyur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (11 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vishamangalesvarar Temple, Thudaiyur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vishamangalesvarar Temple, Thudaiyur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vishamangalesvarar Temple, Thudaiyur?
faq.a: Stays in Vishamangalesvarar Temple, Thudaiyur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vishamangalesvarar Temple, Thudaiyur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tiruvasi Mattruraivaradeswarar Temple, Melur, Tiruchirappalli, Mutharasanallur, Srirangam division, Srirangam.
